caption: The video features two men sitting side by side, reacting to a scene from a movie or TV show displayed on a screen in front of them. The title "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" is prominently shown at the top of the screen. The scene they are watching appears to be from a historical or fantasy setting, with a character named Shaibani Khan seated on a throne-like chair, dressed in elaborate attire. Another figure stands nearby, possibly addressing him. The men seem engaged and focused, with one resting his chin on his hand, suggesting they are intently observing and possibly preparing to comment on the unfolding scene. The background includes a television mounted on the wall, with various DVDs stacked beneath it, indicating a home entertainment setup.
